synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-0756 Moderate: Oracle Linux 8 transfig security update
description:
[1:3.2.6a-5]
- Detect nan in spline control values
- Fix for CVE-2025-46397
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-0756

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-0756.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
transfig-3.2.6a-5.el8_10.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
transfig-3.2.6a-5.el8_10.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/transfig-3.2.6a-5.el8_10.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-46397




Description of changes:

[1:3.2.6a-5]
- Detect nan in spline control values
- Fix for CVE-2025-46397
